name: make-mcp
description: Make.com (Integromat) integration for the Tonkin team — scenarios, executions, data stores, incomplete-execution retries, webhooks and connections

tools.name: make_list_organizations
tools.description: List Make.com organizations available to the token

tools.name: make_list_teams
tools.description: List teams inside a Make.com organization

tools.name: make_list_scenarios
tools.description: List Make.com scenarios for a team or organization

tools.name: make_get_scenario
tools.description: Get full details of a single scenario

tools.name: make_run_scenario
tools.description: Run a scenario on demand (optionally wait for the result)

tools.name: make_start_scenario
tools.description: Activate (turn ON) a scenario

tools.name: make_stop_scenario
tools.description: Deactivate (turn OFF) a scenario

tools.name: make_list_executions
tools.description: List a scenario's execution history (logs)

tools.name: make_get_execution
tools.description: Get details of a single scenario execution/log

tools.name: make_open_in_browser
tools.description: Open a Make.com URL in the default browser

tools.name: make_list_data_stores
tools.description: List data stores (Make's built-in database) for a team

tools.name: make_get_records
tools.description: List the records in a data store

tools.name: make_add_record
tools.description: Add a record to a data store

tools.name: make_update_record
tools.description: Replace a record in a data store by key

tools.name: make_delete_record
tools.description: Delete specific record(s) from a data store by key

tools.name: make_list_incomplete
tools.description: List incomplete/failed executions (DLQ) of a scenario

tools.name: make_retry_execution
tools.description: Retry a single incomplete/failed execution by id

tools.name: make_list_hooks
tools.description: List webhooks for a team (with their URLs)

tools.name: make_trigger_webhook
tools.description: Trigger a scenario by POSTing to its webhook URL

tools.name: make_list_connections
tools.description: List connections (linked app accounts) for a team

tools.name: make_test_connection
tools.description: Verify whether a connection is still valid

api_token.title: Make API token
api_token.description: API токенът от Make. Създава се от: аватара горе вдясно → Profile → API / MCP access → Add token. Дай му права (scopes): scenarios:read, scenarios:write, scenarios:run, teams:read, organizations:read, datastores:read, datastores:write, dlqs:read, dlqs:write, hooks:read, connections:read, connections:write.

zone.title: Region (zone)
zone.description: Регионът на твоя Make акаунт — виждаш го в URL-а на Make дашборда: напр. eu1.make.com → въведи 'eu1'. Възможни: eu1, eu2, us1, us2. Може и пълен хост (напр. eu1.make.celonis.com). Грешен регион дава грешка за достъп дори с валиден токен.

organization_id.title: Organization ID (по желание)
organization_id.description: ID на организацията по подразбиране. Ако е празно и имаш само една организация, тя се избира автоматично. Иначе използвай make_list_organizations.

team_id.title: Team ID (по желание)
team_id.description: ID на екипа по подразбиране за списъка със сценарии. Ако е празно, се пада към организацията. Намери го с make_list_teams.
